title: ReviewFinding
description: Schema for structured code review findings produced by specialist agents and consumed by the orchestrator for deduplication, filtering, and report rendering.

id.description: Unique finding identifier scoped to the specialist (e.g., sec-001, corr-012)

category.description: Review category this finding belongs to

confidence.description: Confidence score (0-100) indicating how certain the specialist is about this finding

file.description: Relative file path where the finding was identified

startLine.description: Starting line number of the finding in the file

description.description: Detailed explanation of the finding, why it matters, and what the risk is

specialist.description: ID of the specialist that produced this finding (e.g., security, correctness, quality)

endLine.description: Ending line number of the finding (optional, defaults to startLine)

codeBefore.description: Code snippet showing the current problematic code

codeAfter.description: Code snippet showing the suggested replacement code

tags.description: Freeform tags for grouping and filtering (e.g., requirements-gap, scope-creep)

ticketRef.description: Ticket ID for requirements alignment findings (e.g., PROJ-1234)
